name: leo-orchestrator-marketplace
description: Multi-Agent Orchestration System by LeoDg - Coordinate 64+ parallel AI agents for complex development tasks

plugins.name: orchestrator-plugin
plugins.description: Revolutionary 64+ Agent Parallel Orchestration System - Coordinate multiple expert agents for complex development tasks with intelligent routing, cost prediction, and performance analytics

commands./orchestrator: Main orchestration command - analyze task and coordinate multiple expert agents
commands./orchestrator-status: Show current orchestration status and metrics
commands./orchestrator-agents: List available expert agents and their specializations
commands./orchestrator-benchmark: Run performance benchmarks for parallel system
